{{Infobox concept
| name = Unknown God
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Unknown God Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Unknown God is a deity central to the [[Luminian Order]], an organization whose members include [[Knights]]-Adjuncts and [[Pilgrims]]. Devotees of this deity often wear silver amulets or medallions featuring the [[White Sun]] crest to seek protection and blessings. [[The Order]] follows specific tenets, such as showing mercy to those who do not deserve it, and members commit themselves to acting as representatives of the god by prioritizing the lives of innocents and seeking to bring light into darkness. The deity is also associated with various titles, including [[He Who Sees]] and the Father of Knowledge. While some view the god as a source of guidance, others interact with his teachings through texts like [[Meditations on the Unknown God]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Unknown God]] has tenets, such as [[Mercy]] for the undeserving.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Andel]] praises the [[Unknown God]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tombstone]] swore to the [[Unknown God]] of the [[Luminian Order]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Andel]] follows the teachings of the [[Unknown God]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius]] invokes the blessings of the [[Unknown God]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|An assassin was converted to the [[Unknown God]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Unknown God]] is a deity mentioned in [[Karson]]'s thoughts.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Unknown God]] is a deity mentioned in thanks.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] wonders if the [[Unknown God]] will take a prayer from him.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Unknown God is a deity worshipped by the Luminians and is central to discussions regarding decisions on how to rule the world. This deity is linked to the revelation of [[Calder Marten]]'s true nature. Devotion to the god is shown through [[Loreli]], who sends a prayer and offers thanks for the protection of the lantern. Additionally, [[Darius]] has sought strength by praying to the Unknown God.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Unknown God]] is mentioned in a context regarding decisions about ruling the world.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Unknown God]] is a deity mentioned in relation to [[Calder Marten]]'s true nature.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Unknown God]] is a deity of the Luminians.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] thanks the [[Unknown God]] for protecting the lantern.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] sends a prayer to the [[Unknown God]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Darius]] prayed to the [[Unknown God]] for strength.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Praise the Unknown God that we’re here to help him,” Andel said drily.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“We don’t have to make any decisions about ruling the world at all, thank the Unknown God.”<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Religion and cults]]
